{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219001400BA1083E061C5C48DCC"}"},"total":428},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7332437947185955608","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"x张力超绝,文笔很好，受是善良可爱的小美人，当然，一般无限流文我都并不是很喜欢这种，笨蛋美人的人设，但是呢，这一本是个例外，关键是他写的实在是太香了，就是那种光写一些小动作都能够香的不得了的那种感觉，可能就像是榴莲千层一样，到底吃了之后才能发现有多香，他这种也并不是像其他的一般无限流突出闯关剧情和主角智慧，更多的像是小美人的角色扮演，反正是很香啦[OK]，香飞我了，实在香飞我了啊[送心]，真的是香的不得了啊，作者考考不考虑在微博上面开个号，补全一下R呀，我肯定关注，一定关注[哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭][哭]"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707218698,"group_id":"7234936399282048015","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1588172887431767"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7234936399282048015","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"214"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16172,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31642,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7332438309832475416","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"好看好看此书，番茄皮海棠骨，x 张力超绝狠狠的踩在我的XP上，万人迷就是应该np（切片工，也应该算np吧），作者大大是不是海棠还有号啊？[爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕][爱慕]，爱死了，我甚至单独下载了，就怕什么时候看不了了[飞吻][飞吻]","text_exts":[{"e":34,"s":31,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177214C5C48DCC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227332438309832475416%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234936399282048015%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1707218023,"group_id":"7234936399282048015","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一个比较佛系的业余人员","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Nx4wIC/2m+8wbP1FE+giS85nVRocRHlgAljKNulkDhE6","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/1437c63bc45b464bb1cc6cd6a7b0d4f1~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1588172887431767","user_name":"大彤不敢苟同"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1588172887431767","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7234936399282048015","book_info":{"abstract":"【无限流＋万人迷+双男主+切片+双洁】
莫名其妙被卷入一场特殊游戏，姜家小少爷捏着自己的炮灰身份卡陷入了沉默。

【荒废神殿里的幽灵神明，觊觎神明的信徒虎视眈眈，为恶犬戴上项圈，他将成为您所有物，握紧那支玫瑰，请在热潮中保持清醒。】
【豪门家族的特殊遗产，野心勃勃的他们想要的可不仅仅是那个位置。】
【末世实验室里的特殊实验品，你的身上似乎总是带着让所有非人类生物难以拒绝的魅力。】
【被献祭给邪神的失忆新娘，看啊，它正期待着与您共赴永恒】
【荒废游乐园中从事特殊直播的小主播，直播间里的观众似乎不仅限于人类】
从其他人的角度来看，姜家小少爷胆小，怕死，没心没肺，还很好骗，除了一张脸能看，似乎再无长处，可偏偏就是这样一个人，却让他们失了神丢了心……

⭐被锁了，要修改

⭐一些发疯文学，逻辑被作者吃掉了，非正常解密类，也不会很严谨，主要是为了看老婆，欢迎捉虫，暂定全文单箭头，没心没肺万人迷，永远不会为任何人动心","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2oe386fa010c97e444cfaf50cf043b08c2~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"乘风听月","author_id":"","book_id":"7234936399282048015","book_name":"无限流：被怪物觊觎的他","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#d8d8d8","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4435人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":70,"name":"无限流","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=70&name=无限流&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":69,"name":"直播","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=69&name=直播&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":757,"name":"现代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=757&name=现代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":702,"name":"双洁","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=702&name=双洁&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7245710768484647476","read_count":"4435","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1243336"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"9.0","serial_count":"553","tags":"双男主,现代,系统,直播,双洁,纯爱,无限流","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/ee8a6c1ea2d122bd7df78a3fd873cad1~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779361214&x-signature=NrzP%2Fq30X1skUpQsK7d0N6tMWA4%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2489774250395294","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"214"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219001400BA1083E061C5C48DCC"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读9小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":38,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":16172,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":31642,"reply_count":3,"show_pv":7217},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1707314052,"author_reply_time":1707314079,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7321056348995994409","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"感觉说作者文笔还蛮好的，描写的也没有说什么很卡壳的地方。然后就是说因为是一篇万人迷文嘛，所以说受描写的美一点，感觉没什么。感情过渡的也挺好，总之来说就是文笔上没有问题[送心]
然后就说故事情节。个人感觉的话，虽然这些副本比较大众[爱心]，但是呢，在作者笔下还是描写的比较带感的，很有张力。男主性子有点软，也许有人不喜欢这样的男主，但是对我来说吸引力蛮大的
然后就是说如果有书友要来看书评，再决定看不看这篇文的话我就先简单介绍一下
仅仅表示个人观点的[爱心]，男主的话性格比较软，但是也有自己的底线，属于那种在穿入恐怖游戏之前是有人宠的小孩所以性格娇纵点，我感觉没什么，然后就是说那些切片其实切片这个套路现在也蛮大众的，喜欢的都蛮喜欢，不喜欢的也不要喷，毕竟大家看书都图个快乐，不喜欢的咱就别说了哈
先列一下，可能会成为雷点的（仅对于部分人来说，但是对于本人来说，这恰好在本人的XP上）男主性格比较软，然后就是万人迷，攻是切片，一个副本里有很多个（看过这种套路的，基本上懂的都懂）
反正就是超级推荐，真的超级推荐，不喜欢的真的不要喷！孩子，之前推的书被喷了，不想再被喷了！谢谢！！！","text_exts":[{"e":41,"s":38,"text":"万人迷","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177214C5C48DCC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227321056348995994409%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234936399282048015%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E4%B8%87%E4%BA%BA%E8%BF%B7%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"},{"e":260,"s":256,"text":"恐怖游戏","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%231774177214C5C48DCC%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227321056348995994409%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227234936399282048015%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%B8%B8%E6%88%8F%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1704568406,"group_id":"7234936399282048015","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"所以到底怎么办？世界爆炸咯(
